stories.title: [Story] Example Story Title
stories.user_story:
As a [role/persona],
I want [feature/capability],
so that [benefit/value].
stories.context:
When [situation/context],
I want to [motivation/need],
so I can [expected outcome].
stories.background:
- Why is this Story important?
- What user pain point does it address?
- Any relevant research or feedback?
stories.acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [expected result]
- [ ] Feature works on desktop and mobile browsers
- [ ] Error handling is implemented for edge cases
- [ ] Performance meets requirements (e.g., <200ms)
stories.notes:
- Design mockup: [link]
- Technical approach: Use library X for Y
- API spec: [link]
